evolution_scope.intent: Consolidate the existing DARK design into one coherent token system + STYLE.md agent contract. Not a new brand.
preserve: the tarja / redaction bar as the signature privacy gesture
mono type for money, addresses, txids
evolve: token names (--seal is blue not oxblood; --pine is mint)
merge lacre.css + redesign.css + App.css into one token system
replace: stray oxblood literals left from the light theme
the two parallel CSS vocabularies (global lacre + .rd-scoped redesign)
